case_title: MUSTAPHA FAHAL VS. NICK NGU CONG BUI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MUSTAPHA FAHAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICK NGU CONG BUI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING OF THIS CASE HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE REGARDING UBER SHARES. PRIOR TO THE HEARINGS HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FAHAL, MUSTAPHA AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, NICK NGU CONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAHAL, MUSTAPHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUI, NICK NGU CONG $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUSTAPHA FAHAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $170) SERVED FEB-19-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, NICK NGU CONG
